summary: Completed comprehensive testing of upgraded POPP Pumps category pages with new SEO headers, advanced filtering, product card enhancements, trust elements, and FAQ sections - 95% success rate

minor_issues.issue: Header overlay intercepts close button clicks on mobile filters sidebar

passed_tests: Backend API health check and all endpoints (100% success - 34/34 tests passed)
Category page SEO headers with H1, H2, intro paragraphs for all categories
Booster Pumps category shows correct SEO content and 4 products
Water Tanks category shows correct SEO content and 5 products
Borehole Pumps category shows correct SEO content and 3 products
Advanced sidebar filters: category, brand, price range slider all functional
Power (kW) filter sections show and filter products correctly
Flow Rate filter sections show and filter products correctly
Sort dropdown works (name asc/desc, price asc/desc)
Product cards show stock status badges (In Stock/Out of Stock)
Product cards show key spec pills (power, flow, head, capacity)
Quick-view button appears on product card hover and opens modal
Quick-view modal shows product details, Add to Quote button, View Full Details link
Compare checkbox appears on product card hover and toggles compare bar
Compare bar appears at bottom when products selected with clear function
Trust Elements bar shows (Delivery, Warranty, Returns, Help with Contact CTA)
FAQ accordion shows category-specific questions and expands/collapses
Buying guide panel shows in sidebar with numbered points and CTA link
Clear all filters button resets all filters
Breadcrumb navigation works (Home > Shop > Category)
Application tags display for each category with relevant keywords
Related categories links functional
Mobile sticky filter button works
Product card hover effects and interactions
Add to cart functionality working with notifications
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile filter overlay z-index issue where header intercepts close button clicks on mobile filters sidebar
